_comment: Recorded UPSTREAM response of the Zürich CKAN datastore_search_sql endpoint (https://data.stadt-zuerich.ch/api/3/action/datastore_search_sql). Replayed via the mocked httpx client; the live-probe job (scripts/live_probe.py) diffs the real endpoint's STRUCTURE against this. Re-record with a real one-shot call — never let a test hit the live API.
